_readme: PHOTO MODE — show live data pinned over a photo of YOUR house:
1. Save a wide photo of your house as static/house.jpg (roughly 16:9).
3. Adjust the coordinates below. Everything is in a 800 x 460 grid
over the image (0,0 = top-left). 'flows' are SVG paths for the
animated power lines; 'chips' place each data pill, with 'anchor'
being the point on the photo its leader line points at.
Delete static/scene.json to go back to the illustrated house.
